title: EasyBedrockBreaker
description: A simple plugin that gives players a pickaxe with configurable durability that breaks the nether roof bedrock!
body:
# Easy BedrockBreaker
I couldn't find an easy, simple bedrock breaking plugin that could allow players to break holes into the nether roof without using tnt tricks, so I made one! A simple plugin that can work great as a vote shop reward or supporter perk!

## Features
### Special Bedrock Breaking Pickaxe
- Customizable durability (number of uses)
- Option to make the pickaxe unbreakable
- Enchanted glow effect
- Custom name and lore
- Configurable pickaxe material (wooden, stone, iron, golden, diamond, or netherite)
  
### Breaking Mechanics
- Optional ability to break end portal frames
- Built-in cooldown system to prevent abuse
- Option to drop broken blocks as items

### Dimension Control
- Configurable dimension restrictions
- Default: Only works in the Nether
- Option to enable for all dimensions
- Blacklist specific worlds

### Crafting System
- Fully customizable crafting recipe
- Default recipe:
  - 3 gold blocks in top row
  - 2 sticks in middle and bottom
- Option to disable crafting completely
- Support for any Minecraft material in recipes

### Customization
- Color-coded messages
- Custom item lore with placeholders
- Configurable error messages
- Dynamic lore updates based on settings
- Support for all Minecraft color codes


## Commands:
- /givebedrockbreaker <name>
  - Permission: bedrockbreaker.give
- bedrockbreaker reload
  - Permission: bedrockbreaker.admin

## Requirements
- Minecraft Server: 1.20+
- Java: 17 or higher
- Server Software: Spigot/Paper

## Installation
1. Download the latest release of BedrockBreaker
2. Place the JAR file in your server's `plugins` folder
3. Restart your server
4. Configure the plugin in `plugins/BedrockBreaker/config.yml`


## Support
Join my discord server for bug reports/feature suggestions: [discord](https://discord.gg/wXJERKw6yJ)
